scripts.bootstrap: npm run bootstrap:sdk && npm run bootstrap:agent && npm run bootstrap:cli && npm run bootstrap:ui
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:agent && npm run build:cli && npm run build:contract && npm run build:ui
scripts.test: npm run test:contract && npm run test:agent && npm run test:sdk && npm run test:cli && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:coverage: cd agent && npm run test -- --coverage && cd sdk && npm run test:coverage && cd cli && npm run test && cd ui && npm run test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:agent && npm run typecheck:sdk && npm run typecheck:cli
scripts.audit: npm run audit:ui && npm run audit:agent && npm run audit:cli && npm run audit:sdk
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run e2e
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci && npm run build && npm run e2e
